mapper.select:
select * from data_function where db_status = 1
and (name like concat('%', #{keyWord}, '%') or func_code like concat('%',#{keyWord}, '%'))

SELECT a.*, case when b.client_id is null then 0 else 1 end AS checkedFunc FROM data_function a LEFT JOIN data_function_authority b ON a.func_code = b.func_code AND b.db_status = 1 AND b.client_id = #{clientId} WHERE a.db_status = 1
select * from data_function_authority where db_status = 1 and client_id = #{clientId}
